notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Adley Rutschman out at 1st.
